decision: autoplan review (SELECTIVE_EXPANSION): one-release kept; Part 1 reframed to reuse AgentTodoSink/todo_update; honesty/liveness/truth-model fixes folded as P1 tasks
rationale: CEO6/6 Design7/7 Eng6/6 DX6/6 cross-model; user approved as-is

decision: Connector strategy: direct OAuth inside Gantry (no embedded Nango service) with Nango providers.yaml ported as declarative templates; org-owned connections; GitHub+Google v1 end-to-end; non-dev Connectors web UI with magic-link entry
rationale: Founder chose deployment leanness (no extra ops component per customer install) over Nango self-host; template port keeps provider #N cheap; UI required for non-developer admins
